name: ChkCreate_MostStableLock, ChkStart_MostStableLock
title: ChkCreate_MostStableLock, ChkStart_MostStableLock
description: The check function monitors the occurrence of "StableLock" events.

A "StableLock" event is generated as soon as the hardware has been in the "Lock" condition for a period of time equal to or longer than tLock (see MOST Specification V 2.4), provided that no "Unlock" events have occurred.
This check always works on events. Therefore, it will not detect a current "StableLock" state, if this state has been entered before the check’s activation.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aCallback
parameters.description: Name of the callback function, which should be called as soon as a "StableLock" event occurs.

return: 0: Check could not be created and must not be referenced
